system.powerDescription:
A cloud of aerosolized venom soaks into the mind of every creature within an up to CAT+1 area. Pick up to two of the following four hallucinations for your enemies to experience. 

• The world turns and screams, everything spins for the target. 
• Faces and voices melt into one smile, it becomes impossible to differentiate humans. 
• They're all plotting behind each other's backs, the target is consumed by paranoia and fears their allies. 
• Noises of your choice are heard by the target, it is impossible to tell which sounds are real and which are fake. 

Gain or grant +1D whenever next you or an ally take advantage of these hallucinations. This power may easily modify the parameters of a roll
